title: Wind Tunnel Sensor Spread: Maximize the Smallest Triangulation Cell
strategies: flat elliptical arc baseline: drop all sensors on one thin ellipse (reproduces the checker baseline)
rounder ring: spread sensors on a fatter ellipse so every triple is less skinny
inscribed circle + seeded monotone hill-climb: jitter one sensor at a time, keep a move only if the minimum triangle area does not shrink
2D dispersion / simulated-annealing constructions that push sensors into the corners the circle wastes
